item.text: {"case_id":"brake-triage-p06","score":1,"pass_criteria_met":false,"fail_signal_observed":false,"positive_wakeup_observed":true,"first_sentence_lock":false,"verdict_commitment_anti_mush":true,"over_forced_verdict":false,"rationale":"The response notices the repeated-manual-gate pattern and limits the requested fridge confirmer to emergency use, then points upstream to process/system ownership. However it still begins by accepting the next confirmer and implements a temporary manual check instead of refusing the next gate as the default. It also does not explicitly name the three prior downstream checks or propose clear subtraction/consolidation/automation beyond a general structural repair deadline."}
